description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mardy/qt:5.9 Docker image, set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive, and configure an apt cache stored in apt-cache/ with key apt-cache. Define a before_script that creates $APT_CACHE_DIR, runs apt-get update and installs pkg-config libexiv2-dev, libegl1-mesa libgl1-mesa-dev libxss1, lcov gcovr xvfb, and sets PKG_CONFIG_PATH to the Qt pkgconfig directory. Add a build_desktop job in the build stage that sets STAGING=$PWD/staging, prepends its lib/pkgconfig to PKG_CONFIG_PATH, builds libauthentication with qmake PREFIX="$STAGING" CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=nomake_tests .. and make -j4 install, then creates a build directory, runs qmake PREFIX="$STAGING" CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=coverage CONFIG+=desktop .. and make -j4, and archives the build/ and staging/ directories as artifacts. Add a test_desktop job in the test stage that depends on build_desktop, sets the same STAGING and PKG_CONFIG_PATH, touches all files in build, runs LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$STAGING/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH" make coverage-html, and stores build/coverage-html/ as an artifact. No special rules or only/except conditions are defined, so both jobs run on all branches.
